scripts.build: npm run build -w @mandate/mandate-engine && npm run build -w @mandate/mcp-server && npm run build -w @mandate/cli && npm run build:cf -w web
scripts.build:cf: npm run build -w @mandate/mandate-engine && npm run build:cf -w web
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build:cf && cd apps/web && npx wrangler deploy
